name: Muffuletta-sal's
recipeIngredient: Salami (hard Italian, cooked salami or Mortadella)
1 1/2 cups Garden salad packed in Vinegar (hot or mild)
recipeInstructions:
1. The muffuletta sandwich is made on a round loaf of French/Italian bread.
2. Split the bread and layer it with the following ingredients: ham, salami (hard Italian, cooked salami or Mortadella), provolone cheese slice, small onion, small bell pepper, 3 stalks celery, 4 cloves garlic, 3 stalks green onion, 1 jalapeno pepper, 3/4 cup Pepperonis/Greek vinegar, Peppers, 1/2 cup Black pitted olives, 1/2 cup Salad olives with pimento, and 1 1/2 cups Garden salad packed in Vinegar (hot or mild).
3. If desired, toast the top of the sandwich.
4. Place the mixture on the meats and top with cheese.
5. Toast under the broiler to melt the cheese and heat the meats.
